accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: personal FM/DM listening system in every class

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: check the daily planner before dismissal

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

accommodations.text: Provide a copy of teacher notes.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a copy of teacher notes

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: pair auditory alerts with a visual cue

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

accommodations.text: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly
Specialized academic instruction reading 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Aanya will write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence and correct capitalization in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes two related sentences with inconsistent capitalization.
goals.target: Five-sentence paragraph with topic sentence in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: accept a change in routine using a coping strategy

goals.text: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
